pi_items.source: Verified via setup_opentoonz.sh which downloads from official opentoonz_sample GitHub repo, and GitHub API confirms dwanko_run.tnz exists.
Verified via setup_task.sh which creates and clears this path.
Verified via verifier.py and export_result.sh which expect file_count >= 24.
Verified via export_result.sh mapping sorted frame files (FILES[0], FILES[11], FILES[23]) to start, mid, and end frames for centroid arc calculation.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires animating a parabolic jump using the official OpenToonz sample 'dwanko_run.tnz'. The output must be rendered to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/jump_arc' as a sequence of at least 24 PNG files. The evaluation uses the start (frame 1), mid (frame 12), and end (frame 24) frames to check for correct spatial movement (left to right, low to high to low).
